evaluators.name: Cheapest 3-Day Pass with Workshops Under $700 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user registered with the cheapest available 3-day ticket that includes workshop credits and costs ≤ $700.

evaluators.name: Four-Session Day 1–2 Agenda with Keynote and AI Track Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user built an agenda with ≥4 qualifying sessions across Day 1 and Day 2, including at least one keynote and one AI & ML track session, all between 09:00–17:00 with non-duplicate start times.

evaluators.name: Day 1 Evening Networking with Free Refreshments Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added all Day 1 evening networking events starting at or after 17:00 that include free refreshments to their schedule.

evaluators.name: Highest-Difficulty Day 2 Design Thinking Workshop Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that, among eligible Day 2 design thinking workshops (≤3 hours, ≤$300), the user added the one with the highest difficulty level to their schedule.

evaluators.name: Gold AI Exhibitors Bookmarked with Day 2 Afternoon Demos Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user bookmarked at least two Gold-level AI tools exhibitors and booked 15-minute demos with each on Day 2 between 14:00 and 16:00.

evaluators.name: Nearby Breakfast Hotel Under $220 Saved Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user saved a hotel within 1 km of the venue costing ≤$220/night with breakfast included, preferring the nearest qualifying option.

evaluators.name: Most Popular Short UX On-Demand Sessions from Last Year Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added at least two of last year’s most popular UX & Design on-demand sessions (≤30 minutes) to their watchlist.

evaluators.name: Three 20-Minute UX Designer Meetings on Day 2 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user scheduled three 20-minute Day 2 meetings between 13:00–15:00 with UX Designers from different companies.
